title: Managing High Blood Pressure with 10 Herbal Teas for Smokers
description: Melissa officinalis teas, also known as lemon balm tea, has been traditionally used to help manage high blood pressure. The tea contains properties and constituents like rosmarinic acid, which acts as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. It also has a calming effect on the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety that can contribute to high blood pressure. Additionally, the tea has vasodilating properties, which help to widen blood vessels, improving blood flow and reducing b...
